steps: Go to https://account.postmarkapp.com/sign_up and create a free account
Log in at https://account.postmarkapp.com and you will be taken to your Servers list
Click on an existing server or create a new one by clicking 'Add Server'
Inside the server, click the 'API Tokens' tab
Your Server API token is displayed — copy it
If you need a new token, click 'Generate New' (a server can have up to 3 tokens)

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Server API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Postmark Server API token, sent as the X-Postmark-Server-Token header

notes: Each Postmark Server has its own API token — tokens are server-scoped, not account-scoped
A server can have up to 3 API tokens active simultaneously
There is also a separate Account API token (used for managing servers/domains) found under Account > API Tokens
Free accounts can send up to 100 emails/month; paid plans start at 1,000 emails/month
New accounts are in a sandbox mode until your sending domain is verified
Postmark focuses on transactional email only — bulk/marketing email is not supported

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the server details associated with the provided Server API token
